global_description: A small, slender songbird with a vibrant orange and black plumage. It features a sleek, streamlined body with a pointed beak and long, thin tail. The wings are black with white bars, and the head is predominantly black with an orange throat and underparts.

part_details.head: Predominantly black with an orange throat, sleek and rounded.
part_details.wings: Black with distinct white bars, elongated and pointed.
part_details.tail: Long, thin, and black, tapering to a point.
part_details.body: Slender and streamlined, bright orange underparts.
part_details.beak: Pointed, conical, and slightly curved, suitable for feeding on insects and nectar.

spatial_relations: The orange throat is positioned below the black head.
The black wings extend laterally from the body.
The long tail extends from the rear of the body.
